name: Easter Bunny Wreath - Threshold™
description:
This Easter Bunny Wreath from Threshold™ brings charming seasonal style to your home. This Easter bunny wreath with woven accents features a 10-inch circular shape with bunny ears on top, multicolor floral accents in green, off-white, pink and yellow pastel shades and a pink bow on the bottom, creating an adorable springtime display. Designed for indoor use, the convenient top loop makes hanging easy on doors, walls or anywhere you want to welcome the season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
